queries.question: For each duty-free shop, list the price of its products.
queries.sql: select duty_free_shops.name , products.price from Duty_Free_Shops_Products join Products on Duty_Free_Shops_Products.product_id = Products.product_id join Duty_Free_Shops on Duty_Free_Shops_Products.shop_id = Duty_Free_Shops.shop_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?price WHERE {
  ?duty_free_shops_products a :Duty_Free_Shops_Products .
  ?products a :Products .
  ?duty_free_shops_products p:hasProducts ?products .
  ?duty_free_shops a :Duty_Free_Shops .
  ?duty_free_shops_products p:hasDuty_Free_Shops ?duty_free_shops .
  ?duty_free_shops p:name ?name .
  ?products p:price ?price .
}

queries.question: Give me the ids and prices of products that are common to all duty free shops.
queries.sql: SELECT Products.product_id, Products.price  from Duty_Free_Shops_Products join Products on Duty_Free_Shops_Products.product_id = Products.product_id join Duty_Free_Shops on Duty_Free_Shops_Products.shop_id = Duty_Free_Shops.shop_id   GROUP BY Duty_Free_Shops_Products.product_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Duty_Free_Shops_Products.shop_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Duty_Free_Shops)

queries.question: Tell me the ids and categories of the products every shop sells.
queries.sql: SELECT Products.product_id, Products.category  from Duty_Free_Shops_Products join Products on Duty_Free_Shops_Products.product_id = Products.product_id join Duty_Free_Shops on Duty_Free_Shops_Products.shop_id = Duty_Free_Shops.shop_id   GROUP BY Duty_Free_Shops_Products.product_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Duty_Free_Shops_Products.shop_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Duty_Free_Shops)

queries.question: List the price of products sold in every duty-free shop.
queries.sql: SELECT Products.price  from Duty_Free_Shops_Products join Products on Duty_Free_Shops_Products.product_id = Products.product_id join Duty_Free_Shops on Duty_Free_Shops_Products.shop_id = Duty_Free_Shops.shop_id   GROUP BY Duty_Free_Shops_Products.product_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Duty_Free_Shops_Products.shop_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Duty_Free_Shops)
